'''Brebu''' the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] ordered the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[ProfitSmasher]]'' shot down, after her crew failed to pay a debt they owed to him. Years later, Brebu himself returned to the crash site and turned the starship's hulk into a base of operations and his own headquarters.
